# mixpanel_custom_alert (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bookmark_id` (Number)
- `frequency` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `paused` (Boolean)

### Optional

- `condition` (String)
- `custom_alert_id` (Number)
- `notification_windows` (Attributes) Notification windows configuration for an alert. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_windows))
- `project_id` (Number)
- `subscriptions` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--notification_windows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_windows`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether notification windows are active

Optional:

- `windows` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_windows--windows))

<a id="nestedatt--notification_windows--windows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_windows.windows`

Required:

- `end_day` (Number) End day: 0-6 (same week), 7-13 (next week)
- `end_time` (String) End time in HH:MM format
- `start_day` (Number) Start day: 0-6 (Mon-Sun)
- `start_time` (String) Start time in HH:MM format
